modules.contract: Consumes aggregate health summary and top blocker cards; never owns Site Health findings.
Consumes provisioning/template readiness blockers and unresolved critical findings.
Supplies role/access posture; Site Health displays and redacts, never mutates permissions.
Supplies library posture and document-control dependency status; Site Health does not move/open/copy files.
Supplies permitting/inspection dependency readiness signals; no AHJ writeback.
Supplies accountable owner references for health checks and findings.
May receive derived constraints from critical unresolved health findings only through governed handoff.
May surface procurement/configuration dependency health where project setup affects buyout readiness.
Supplies preconstruction workspace setup readiness and project transition dependencies.
Owns governed approval/checkpoint workflow for repair requests and exceptions.
Owns registry, mappings, source-health snapshots, and external audit events consumed by Site Health.
Owns settings definitions, values, validation results, change requests, and settings health snapshots.
Displays derived health action candidates; does not own health check authority.
Indexes health evidence and provides grounded explanation, with no mutation authority.
Consumes portfolio/site risk summaries only; sensitive details redacted.
May verify technical evidence; no tenant mutation unless a later explicit command package authorizes.
Stores narrative traceability and durable finding summaries where approved.
Links setup, readiness, external systems, settings, and closeout dependencies.
Primary desired-state authority for project site template compliance.
Global project/configuration authority; Site Health consumes references and check definitions.
modules.module: HB Central configuration and project records
